The Clock Spring is not functioning in our 2015 Audi Q3. The horn is non-functioning and we were told by the Audi dealership, after waiting for that part for three months, that there is a 50-50 chance that the driver air bag will not deploy and the cruise control is not working.

I was driving and the car went out of control.  I had the steering wheel straight, but the rear end started to fishtail in and out of the oncoming lane of traffic. As this happened I had to quickly jerk the steering wheel to get it out of the other lane of oncoming traffic. I had

narrative.headline: What 2015 Audi Q3 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 22 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (36% of reports).
